---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: "type:feature"
assignees: ""
---

## Summary
One sentence describing the feature.

## Motivation
Why is this useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution
How would you implement this? What APIs/libraries would it use?

## Pipeline stage affected
- [ ] reMarkable sync / auth
- [ ] .rm file parsing
- [ ] Image preprocessing
- [ ] OCR
- [ ] NotebookLM / Gemini integration
- [ ] PDF generation
- [ ] PDF upload
- [ ] CLI / config

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you considered and why you rejected them.

## Additional context
Links to relevant docs, libraries, or prior art.
